aasimar.description: Mortals who carry a spark of the Upper Planes within their souls

dragonborn.description: Descendants hatched from the eggs of chromatic and metallic dragons

dwarf.description: Raised from the earth in the elder days by a deity of the forge

elf.description: Magical people of otherworldly grace with curiosity for other planes

gnome.description: Magical folk created by gods of invention, illusions, and life underground

goliath.description: Distant descendants of giants who seek heights above their ancestors

halfling.description: Brave and adventurous spirits led on journeys of discovery

human.description: Found throughout the multiverse, as varied as they are numerous

orc.description: Equipped with gifts to wander great plains, vast caverns, and churning seas

tiefling.description: Born in the Lower Planes or with fiendish ancestors who originated there
